metadata.task: Determine the center of mass of an L-shaped object by observing its equilibrium position when suspended from different points.
metadata.description: Work from the Center of Mass Determination scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: LLM observes hanging angles to find intersecting lines and locate center of mass.
reasoning: An object hangs so that its center of mass lies directly beneath the suspension point.
